name: @epicenter/local-books
description: Headless CLI that mirrors QuickBooks Online into a local SQLite database via full pull + incremental CDC.

scripts.auth:remote: infisical run --env=prod --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts auth --env production
scripts.sync:remote: infisical run --env=prod --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts sync --env production
scripts.status:remote: infisical run --env=prod --path=/apps/local-books -- bun run src/bin.ts status --env production
